Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.sync_service import sync_service
from app.schemas.sync import SyncEvent
async def main\(\):
    agen = sync_service.subscribe\('demo'\)
    t = asyncio.create_task\(agen.__anext__\(\)\)
    await asyncio.sleep\(0.05\)
    await sync_service.publish\(SyncEvent\(entity='inventory', action='updated', businessId='demo', recordId='r1', actorUserId='u1', payload={'x':1}\)\)
    e = await asyncio.wait_for\(t, timeout=1\)
    print\('PUBLISHED/RECEIVED OK:', e.entity, e.recordId\)
    aclose_result = await asyncio.wait_for\(agen.aclose\(\), timeout=1\)
    print\('CLOSE OK:', aclose_result\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
